content: ODISHA FIRE & EMERGENCY SERVICE FIRE SAFETY CERTIFICATE FORM-V [Under rule-13(3) of the Odisha Fire Prevention and Fire Safety Rules, 2017] Certificate No: FIRCER1409280032023003474/00 Application No: REN1409280032023000893 Date of Issue: 26-09-2023 Date of Receipt of Application: 16-09-2023 Valid Up to: 25-09-2025 (midnight) (Apply for Renewal of Fire Safety Certificate at least three months before its expiry) Certified that the GIETUniversity, GunupurGobiriguda, GunupurRayagadaOdisha765022 Situated at Plot No-42/95/57, Khata No.-15/57, Street-GIET University, Gunupur, Mouza- Gobiriguda, Police Station-Gunupur, District-Rayagada, Fire Station-Gunupur, Consisting of total 2 Number of Towers/Blocks, was inspected by officers of the Fire Service on 22-09-2023 In presence of Ranjit Kumar Panigrahi, Accountant. and it has been found to comply with the fire prevention and safety requirements in accordance with the Odisha Fire Prevention and Fire Page 1 of 3 Safety Rules, 2017 read with Odisha Fire Prevention and Fire Safety(Amendment) Rules,2019 and that its various floors are fit for occupancy or usage as noted hereunder against each subject to compliance to the conditions as prescribed herein below: 1. * Name of the Building(s)/Tower(s)/Block(s):- Mechanical Block, GIETU, Gunupur * Floor wise occupancy:- Sl.No. Floors in Tower/Block Usage 1 Ground floor- Smart class room, class rooms & staff room 2 1st Floor- Class rooms 3 2nd Floor- auditorium 2. * Name of the Building(s)/Tower(s)/Block(s):- Biotech Block, GIETU Gunupur * Floor wise occupancy:- Sl.No. Floors in Tower/Block Usage 1 Ground floor- Class room-03 Nos & chemistry lab 2 1st Floor- RKD lab-01 No, class room-01 No, molecular biology lab-01 No, microbiology lab-01 No, biointrumentation lab-01 No, staff room-01 No, hod room-01 No & tissue culture lab-01 No 3 2nd Floor- Class room-02 Nos, physics lab-02 Nos & seminar hall-01 Nos CONDITIONS:- 1. Fire prevention and safety measures and appliances, availability of water supplies and means of access thereto etc provided in the building or premises, should be maintained by the occupier(s) in best repairs and efficient working condition at all times for use by the occupants or the members of the Fire Service or both in the event of outbreak of fire. 2. The set-backs, driveways, entrance gates, exits, staircases, corridors and escape way should not be changed, obstructed or modified in any way. 3. The occupiers(s) shall train all staff and occupants periodically to make them well conversant in use and operation of the fire prevention and safety measures. 4. Fire drills/rehearsals should be organised at least once in six months by involving Local Fire Station. 5. Photocopies of this Certificate should be framed and displayed at all conspicuous places in all lobbies/corridors in all floors of all Towers/Blocks of building/premises. 6. The maintenance of fire safety installation in the building / premise shall be owner’s / occupier’s liability as per Rule-16 of OFP & FS Rules, 2017. He shall maintain the same in good repairs and working condition at all times. Any lapses in fire safety installation during fire incident if any shall end with owner’s / occupier’s responsibility. By order of the Director of Fire Service Page 2 of 3 Birabhadra Tudu Deputy Fire Officer,Koraput Circle NOTE (i) It is a digitally signed electronically generated certificate and therefore needs no ink-signed signature. (ii) This Certificate is issued as per section 4, 5,& 6 of Information Technology Act 2000 and its subsequent amendments in 2008. (iii)For any Query or Verification , Agency /Department / Office may visit https://fireservices.odisha.gov.in (iv)Tampering of this Certificate will attract penal action. Powered by TCPDF (www.tcpdf.org) Page 3 of 3 Signed by : BIRABHADRA TUDU Date : 26-09-2023 13:07:55 Signature Not Verified
summary: The occupiers(s) shall train all staff and occupants periodically to make them well conversant in use and operation of the fire prevention and safety measures. The maintenance of fire safety installation in the building / premise shall be owner’s / occupier’s liability as per Rule-16 of OFP & FS Rules, 2017. (iii)For any Query or Verification , Agency /Department / Office may visit https://fireservices.odisha.gov.in (iv)Tampering of this Certificate will attract penal action.
